title: スプリンターズSの後に・王の道

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Just as we all expected, she's done it! She's won
the G1 Dual Sprints!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes! You've all just borne witness to the most
elegant, first-rate running you've ever seen!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehehe. We both knew this was coming. ♪

text_block_list.name: Veteran Cameraman
text_block_list.text: King! Please look over here!

text_block_list.name: Novice Cameraman
text_block_list.text: Hey, over here too! Show us your best smile!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! But, of course! I'll grant you all the
right to take the ultimate shot of your lives!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, wow. The media works quickly.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Look at these headlines. "The Sprinting Heroine
King Halo." "Will she conquer the Dual Sprints
again next year?"

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Heheh. Still...
Buzz, buzz.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, there goes my phone again, always at times
like this! Who in the world could it be?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Ugh, she always calls at the worst times. I
suppose I'll answer.
Beep.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text: ...I didn't think you'd actually be successful.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Everything is going exactly the way I
expected. I guess not so much for you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
So what's next? The Mile Championship? Do you
plan to take on both the sprint and the mile?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, that's too boring. I couldn't possibly be
content with only dominating short-distance
races.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I am King Halo and my talent is infinite.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
My next stop to showcase my talent is the autumn
Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text: How foolish.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Who are you talking about? Sadly, I don't
have time to find out about that. I've got to go
now.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text: I see. Well...

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text: You had better win.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...If I'm foolish, then she's just as equally foolish.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I still remember her words...

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Why debut now? Everyone is so talented, they're
bound to crush you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text: Come home before you embarrass yourself.

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You're better off coming home now, before you
have another chance to disgrace yourself even
further.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But now she says I'd better win.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: As if I need to be told that.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's go, Trainer. My road to glory
continues.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, next is the autumn Tenno Sho. I can't wait
to hear the crowd's cheers.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: They'd better go wild when I cross the finish line!
